name: Fishing Rod
effect: Can be used during downtime or a short rest to attempt to catch Digi-Fish from any body of Digital World water. Make a Field Ops skill check — DN 10 for calm water, DN 14 for rough or unusual water. On a success, catch one Digi-Fish.
notes: Field Ops check: DN 10 calm water, DN 14 rough/unusual. Catch 1 Digi-Fish on success.
